meta.purpose: Prompt catalog for generating the unique sprites flagged by the codebase art audit.
post_processing: ensure RGBA transparent background (gpt-image-1 background=transparent, else rembg)
slight desaturate/contrast to match the grim palette
wiring_after_generation: drop each PNG at its target_path
set each listed object's config `animation` to the entry's `animation` value
add a configure_file(res/images/<path> images/<path> COPYONLY) line in CMakeLists.txt for each new file
run python3 scripts/validate_content.py to confirm no object points at a missing image
meta.style_suffix_monster_item: grim painterly dark-fantasy video-game sprite, single subject centered and filling the frame, dramatic low-key chiaroscuro lighting with cold rim-light, muted desaturated ash-and-iron palette, highly detailed, ominous, plain fully transparent background, no text, no logo, no border, no ground shadow
meta.style_suffix_npc: grim dark-fantasy character portrait, head and shoulders, weathered realistic features, moody low-key lighting, muted palette, painterly, plain fully transparent background, no text, no border
meta.style_suffix_structure: dark-fantasy map structure sprite seen from a 3/4 top-down angle so it sits on a tile map, single object centered, weathered and grim, moody lighting, plain fully transparent background, no text, no border
